item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Konstitusi kita mencakup prinsip keadilan sosial, yang berarti hak individu tidak selalu tunduk pada kebutuhan kelompok.

notes: Agent A opens by agreeing that collective safety and public interest are often prioritized in Indonesia, but by the final turn moves to a more balanced social-justice frame where individual rights do not always yield to group needs. Agent B remains rights-first and constitutionally framed, while acknowledging that U.S. rights protections are not universal and can be limited for national security, public health, or criminal behavior. Agent A has a mixed-case opener artifact: "AKU SETuju".
